mapper.sql: FROM board_item i JOIN member m ON i.reg_id = m.id WHERE i.bo_seq = #{boardId} AND (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y')

choose.when: AND (LOWER(i.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(i.content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')))

mapper.select:
SELECT i.bi_seq, i.title, i.content, i.bi_category, COALESCE(i.read_count, 0) AS read_count, COALESCE(i.like_count, 0) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc WHERE bc.bi_seq = i.bi_seq AND (bc.delete_yn IS NULL OR bc.delete_yn != 'Y')) AS comment_count, i.fix_yn, i.reg_id, m.name AS reg_user_name, m.region_name AS reg_user_region_name, i.reg_date, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM board_item_like bil WHERE bil.bi_seq = i.bi_seq AND bil.mb_id = #{memberId}::uuid ) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM board_file bf WHERE bf.bi_seq = i.bi_seq) THEN true ELSE false END AS has_file
ORDER BY i.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.bc_seq, c.bi_seq, c.parent_seq, c.depth, c.content, COALESCE(c.like_count, 0) AS like_count, c.secret_yn, c.fix_yn, c.delete_yn, c.reg_id, m.name AS reg_user_name, c.reg_date, c.update_id, c.update_date, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM board_comment_like bcl WHERE bcl.bc_seq = c.bc_seq AND bcl.mb_id = #{memberId}::uuid ) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.reg_id = m.id WHERE c.bi_seq = #{itemId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.fix_yn = 'Y' AND c.parent_seq IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(c.parent_seq, c.bc_seq), CASE WHEN c.parent_seq IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, c.reg_date ASC
